data.evacuation_orders: Fort Robinson State Park in Dawes County Areas immediately north of Crawford's city center, including: Areas south of Dodd Road Areas west of Dodd Road Dodd Road at Holmgren Road Ponderosa Villa Assisted Living Facility
data.evacuation_warnings: Residents West of Toadstool Road to Milford Road and south of Sand Creek Road and north of Cottonwood Road Residences south of Highway 20 to 4 Mile Road in Sioux County City of Crawford
data.evacuation_advisories: Residents northwest of Crawford and south of Forest Service Road 928, west of Highway 2/71 to Toadstool Road
data.evacuation_notes: Evacuees are directed to Chadron, Alliance, or Scottsbluff.

data.information:
An evacuation shelter is open at Andrews Hall on the Chadron State College campus.

The shelter is providing:

  • Two meals per day

  • Water and snacks

  • A safe place to stay and access support services

Update from South Fork Fire Nebraska page on Facebook.

This shelter is being operated by Chadron State College with support from the American Red Cross per the Nebraska Red Cross-Nebraska Iowa Region.
